title: ericameria cuneata var. cuneata
intro: Ericameria cuneata var. cuneata, also known as Rock Mountain goldenrod, is a shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rock Mountain goldenrod often take the form of tinctures, salves, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
